channel.title: GitHub MDX Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of MDX in GitHub

item.title: OnedocLabs/react-print-pdf
item.description: Build and generate PDF using React 📄 UI kit for PDFs and print documents. Simple, reusable components and templates to create great invoices, docs, brochures. Use your favorite front-end framework React to build your next PDF.

item.title: dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide
item.description: 🐙 Guides, papers, lecture, notebooks and resources for prompt engineering

item.title: tailwindlabs/tailwindcss.com
item.description: The Tailwind CSS documentation website.

item.title: npm/documentation
item.description: Documentation for the npm registry, website, and command-line interface.

item.title: leerob/leerob.io
item.description: ✨ My portfolio built with Next.js, Tailwind, and Vercel.

item.title: rainbow-me/rainbowkit
item.description: The best way to connect a wallet 🌈 🧰

item.title: newrelic/docs-website
item.description: Source code for @newrelic docs. We welcome pull requests and questions on our docs!

item.title: openai/openai-cookbook
item.description: Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

item.title: chakra-ui/chakra-ui
item.description: ⚡️ Simple, Modular & Accessible UI Components for your React Applications

item.title: axelarnetwork/axelar-docs
item.description: Resources & Documentation for Axelar Network

item.title: MarsX-dev/floatui
item.description: Beautiful and responsive UI components and templates for React and Vue (soon) with Tailwind CSS.

item.title: withastro/docs
item.description: Astro documentation

item.title: getsentry/sentry-docs
item.description: Sentry's documentation (and tools to build it)

item.title: cpinitiative/usaco-guide
item.description: A free collection of curated, high-quality resources to take you from Bronze to Platinum and beyond.

item.title: uidotdev/usehooks
item.description: A collection of modern, server-safe React hooks – from the ui.dev team

item.title: radix-ui/website
item.description: Website and documentation for Radix.

item.title: solidjs/solid-docs-next
item.description: SolidJS Core Docs.

item.title: OffchainLabs/arbitrum-docs
item.description: Arbitrum Docs! Content + Webapp

item.title: yangshun/front-end-interview-handbook
item.description: ⚡️ Front End interview preparation materials for busy engineers

item.title: react-native-elements/react-native-elements
item.description: Cross-Platform React Native UI Toolkit

item.title: webpack/webpack.js.org
item.description: Repository for webpack documentation and more!

item.title: huggingface/audio-transformers-course
item.description: The Hugging Face Course on Transformers for Audio

item.title: yewstack/yew
item.description: Rust / Wasm framework for creating reliable and efficient web applications

item.title: aws-amplify/docs
item.description: AWS Amplify Framework Documentation
